timelines.notes: Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across Al Jazeera's sanctions coverage (per user instruction). Primary anchor source is the AJ six-months timeline article 'Timeline: Six months of Russia's war in Ukraine' (https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/8/24/timeline-six-months-of-russias-war-in-ukraine), which is explicitly date-by-date and supplies 9 sanctions-related dated events between Feb 24 and Jul 3, 2022. The AJ aggregator pieces (Feb 23, Feb 25 sanctions lists) were used to confirm/anchor the Feb 23 and Feb 24 entries since the day-of articles report 'on Friday' or 'last week' without specific dates. Additional contributing articles: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/2/23/what-sanctions-have-been-imposed-on-russia ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/2/25/list-of-sanctions-on-russia-after-invasion ; https://www.aljazeera.com/economy/2022/2/24/uk-unveils-most-severe-sanctions-against-russia ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/4/6/us-bans-investments-in-russia-in-fresh-sanction-package ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/4/18/putin-says-wests-sanctions-blitz-has-failed ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/6/3/sixth-eu-sanctions-round-formally-approved-with-russian-oil-ban ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/6/17/putin-dismisses-stupid-western-sanctions-blitzkrieg ; https://www.aljazeera.com/economy/2022/8/29/did-sanctions-really-hurt-the-russian-economy ; https://www.aljazeera.com/economy/2023/10/24/kremlin-says-russian-economy-ready-to-handle-more-sanctions ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/9/6/us-eu-uk-officials-visit-uae-to-discuss-russia-sanctions-cnn-report ; https://www.aljazeera.com/features/2023/12/20/sanctions-on-russian-oil-have-failed-were-they-ever-meant-to-succeed ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/2/21/eu-approves-new-sanctions-against-russia-over-ukraine-war ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/2/23/us-to-sanction-500-russia-linked-targets-ahead-of-ukraine-war-anniversary ; https://www.aljazeera.com/economy/2024/5/2/us-sanctions-hundreds-of-individuals-firms-over-russias-war-in-ukraine . Opinion pieces (AJ 'shooting themselves in the foot', 'Russia after a year of sanctions', 'sanctions on Russia may not be working') were read for context but no dated entries drawn from them since the spec privileges news over opinion as the primary source. Date approximations per rule 4: Feb 23, 2022 (initial pre-invasion tranche after Donetsk/Luhansk recognition) — AJ Feb 23 'what sanctions have been imposed' piece reports the actions Western capitals took 'over the past two days'; Feb 23 chosen as the publication date and most defensible anchor for the initial responses. Feb 26, 2022 (EU SWIFT ban) — AJ 6-months timeline says 'February 26-27'; Feb 26 chosen as first defensible day per rule. Dec 5, 2022 (oil price cap) — AJ 'sanctions on Russian oil have failed' Dec 2023 piece confirms Dec 5 2022 effective date for the G7/EU $60 cap. Source disagreements: AJ's editorial stance over time grew skeptical of sanctions efficacy (Putin's Apr 18 and Jun 17 statements are reported alongside AJ analysis questioning whether sanctions worked); each Putin statement entry preserves what he said on that date, with the disagreement noted here rather than packed into the summary. No private individuals named — all named figures (Putin) are public officials.

Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across CNN's Russia-sanctions coverage (per user instruction). Contributing articles: https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/22/business/sanctions-russia-ukraine (Feb 22 first tranche, Biden response to Donbas recognition) ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/22/politics/russia-ukraine-invasion-putin-what-matters ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/24/politics/biden-sanctions-russia-ukraine ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/24/politics/joe-biden-ukraine-russia-sanctions ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/25/business/list-global-sanctions-russia-ukraine-war-intl-hnk (the global tally piece anchoring Feb 25 coordinated allied action) ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/03/02/politics/sanctions-russians-belarusians ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/03/14/politics/russia-economy-sanctions-ruble-what-matters (Mar 14 rouble freefall analysis) ; https://www.cnn.com/europe/live-news/ukraine-russia-putin-news-04-07-22 (Apr 7 Treasury action against Putin's daughters, Sberbank, Alfa-Bank) ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/05/08/politics/us-russia-sanctions-media-companies-consulting-services (May 8 consulting/media ban) ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/09/16/politics/russia-sanctions-ukraine-slow-economic-pain ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/09/30/politics/us-russia-sanctions-ukraine-annexation (Sep 30 response to annexation of four regions) ; https://www.cnn.com/2022/12/05/energy/russia-oil-embargo-price-cap-explainer (Dec 5 G7 price cap explainer) ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/01/29/europe/russia-sanctions-putin-ukraine-economy-intl (Jan 29 2024 retrospective on sanctions impact) ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/23/politics/us-sanctions-russia (Aug 23 2024 ~400 entities/individuals action). Articles considered but dropped per rule 5 (out of cluster window): https://www.cnn.com/2025/10/22/politics/bessent-sanctions-russia ; https://www.cnn.com/2025/06/10/world/europe-new-sanctions-russia-strength-intl ; https://www.cnn.com/2025/01/10/politics/biden-admin-russia-energy-sanctions-ukraine (Jan 10 2025 final Biden energy sanctions targeting Gazprom Neft/Surgutneftegas and the shadow fleet; this falls 10 days after cluster end). Date approximations and verifications per rule 4: Apr 7, 2022 (Putin's daughters sanctioned, Sberbank/Alfa-Bank fully blocked) — CNN's live blog covers this on Apr 7; the Treasury action was announced that day. Feb 24, 2023 (sanctions on metals/mining sector) — CNN coverage on the one-year anniversary; the date is the well-established one-year mark and matches CNN's reporting cadence. Nov 21, 2024 (Gazprombank designation) — verified against multiple primary sources including the US Treasury press release JY-2725 dated Nov 21, 2024, which announced sanctions on Gazprombank, 50+ Russian banks, 40+ securities registrars, and 15 finance officials; this replaced an earlier draft 'Dec 13 2024' entry which was incorrect. Mar 14, 2022 (rouble freefall) is dated to CNN's piece publication date, not the start of the rouble's decline (which began earlier); used per rule 4 as the most defensible specific anchor since CNN framed it as that day's analysis. Source disagreements: Jan 29, 2024 CNN piece reports Russian economy has 'proven resilient' under sanctions; this contradicts earlier Mar 14, 2022 CNN framing of rouble 'freefall' — both retained on respective dates per rule, since they reflect what was reported then. No private individuals named — all named figures (Biden, Putin, Yellen, Navalny — the latter only by reference in the Feb 23 2024 entry, and he is a public political opposition figure of record) are public officials/figures.
